nodes.context: American white separatist organization founded in 1994, active until 2012.
Neo-Nazi organization mentioned as using the same rune symbol.
White supremacist group formed in Texas, linked to Volksfront members.
White supremacist group founded in the United Kingdom in 1987, linked to Volksfront members.

edges.evidence_quote: The logo of Volksfront was the Algiz rune, a common rune used as a neo-Nazi symbol common among other organizations such as National Alliance.
edges.context: Both organizations use the same neo-Nazi symbol, but no direct relationship is asserted.

edges.evidence_quote: A number of Volksfront's members were linked with the Hammerskins, a white supremacist group formed in Texas
edges.context: Members of Volksfront were linked to Hammerskins.

edges.evidence_quote: A number of Volksfront's members were linked with the Hammerskins, a white supremacist group formed in Texas, and Blood & Honour, a group founded in the United Kingdom in 1987.
edges.context: Members of Volksfront were linked to Blood & Honour.
